title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: redhat-release bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for redhat-release is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The redhat-release package contains licensing information regarding, and identifies the installed version of, Red Hat Enterprise Linux.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL 10.1][redhat-release] Include PQC signing public key in default keyring (0-day) [Oct 22] (JIRA:RHELBLD-17163)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems

fixes.description: [RHEL 10.1][redhat-release] Include PQC signing public key in default keyring (0-day) [Oct 22]

full_text:
An update for redhat-release is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The redhat-release package contains licensing information regarding, and identifies the installed version of, Red Hat Enterprise Linux.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): [RHEL 10.1][redhat-release] Include PQC signing public key in default keyring (0-day) [Oct 22] (JIRA:RHELBLD-17163)
